properties.name: Colosseum
properties.quest: Discuss spectacle, engineering and public power.

properties.name: Pompeii
properties.summary: Roman city preserved by the eruption of Vesuvius.
properties.quest: Use the site as a frozen interface into daily life.

properties.name: Herculaneum
properties.summary: Roman town preserved by volcanic material.

properties.name: Leptis Magna
properties.summary: Major Roman city in present-day Libya.
properties.quest: Ask how empire reshapes local urban identity.

properties.name: Volubilis
properties.quest: Trace the edge of empire on a map.

properties.name: Jerash
properties.summary: Major Roman city site in Jordan.
properties.quest: Compare city grids, theatres and colonnaded streets.

properties.name: Bath Roman Baths
properties.summary: Roman bathing and temple complex in Britain.
properties.quest: Study water, ritual and urban life.
